nodes.label: 黄峥
nodes.summary: Pinduoduo founder whose company-building logic centers on ordinary users, demand aggregation, supply-chain reform, benfen, common sense, and long-term public-institution building.

nodes.label: 段永平
nodes.summary: Mentor/investor associated with benfen, normal mind, doing the right thing first, and long-term value.

nodes.label: 巴菲特
nodes.summary: Reference point for simple common sense, owner mindset, compounding, and treating money as a tool.

nodes.label: Google
nodes.summary: Early operating school for Huang: mission before profit, culture, local execution difficulty, and domain limits.

nodes.label: 拼多多
nodes.summary: New-commerce platform aiming to be a public institution serving broad users through value-for-money, interaction, demand aggregation, and supply-chain efficiency.

nodes.label: 本分
nodes.summary: Be trustworthy, do one's duty, return to the original purpose, do not take advantage, and first look inward when problems occur.

nodes.label: 常识与事实
nodes.summary: Understand background and facts, then have the courage to judge with rational common sense rather than clever narratives.

nodes.label: 平常心
nodes.summary: Fast can be slow and slow can be fast; do the current thing well while keeping a distant direction.

nodes.label: 公众机构
nodes.summary: The company should create public value, reduce personal color, mature its governance, and survive beyond the founder.

nodes.label: 独特存在
nodes.summary: A great company creates a new dimension and becomes hard to compare, rather than becoming a smaller copy of an incumbent.

nodes.label: 人为先
nodes.summary: New commerce starts from people, relations, scenes, and emotions rather than products, search, or traffic.

nodes.label: 不把人当流量
nodes.summary: Treating consumers as traffic/assets sold to merchants is fragile and misses real demand.

nodes.label: 拼
nodes.summary: A mechanism that turns shared demand, social relation, timing, or interest into many-to-many matching and demand certainty.

nodes.label: 需求侧变革
nodes.summary: Demand-side aggregation, patience, and coordination can pull supply-side reform.

nodes.label: C2M/反向定制
nodes.summary: Concentrated user demand enables factories/farms to produce differentiated batches and reach consumers more directly.

nodes.label: Costco+Disney
nodes.summary: Future retail combines high value-for-money with joy, social interaction, entertainment, and virtual-real integration.

nodes.label: 错位竞争
nodes.summary: Find a new scene or dimension instead of fighting incumbents for the same territory.

nodes.label: 开放生态
nodes.summary: Create new choices and resist replacing one monopoly with another.

nodes.label: 打假/质量治理
nodes.summary: Trust mechanisms must prevent bad actors from defining the platform.

nodes.label: 系统化规则
nodes.summary: Reduce manual intervention, corruption, and arbitrary selection by moving rules and recommendation into systems.

nodes.label: 传承与合伙人机制
nodes.summary: Make younger management and institutional governance carry the company beyond the founder.

edges.evidence: Interviews attribute benfen and doing the right thing first to Duan's influence.
Huang describes the Buffett lunch as an encounter with simple/common-sense judgment.
Google taught mission/culture, financial freedom side effects, and limits of global internet companies in China.
sources: 黄峥公众号文集（完整版）.pdf: 我的第一份工作

edges.evidence: IPO letter defines Pinduoduo's value core as benfen and applies it to management's consumer focus.
Huang repeatedly contrasts people-first new commerce with treating consumers as traffic.
Pin aggregates scattered demand and provides time/volume certainty for supply-side response.
sources: 黄峥公众号文集（完整版）.pdf: 市场多一点...

edges.evidence: Demand-side coordination can turn rigid mass production into smaller differentiated batches.
sources: 黄峥公众号文集（完整版）.pdf: 市场多一点...

edges.evidence: Cost efficiency/value-for-money is paired with joy and entertainment as the long-term retail form.
Huang rejects being a small Alibaba and frames PDD/Taobao as different scenes.
2019 letter emphasizes new choices, openness in logistics/cloud/payment, and non-zero-sum competition.
Anti-counterfeit and consumer compensation are treated as platform duty and trust preservation.
Huang links manual selection/recommendation to corruption risk and points toward algorithmic selection.
2020 company letter hands CEO role to younger management and frames PDD as not a personal tool.

alignment_heuristics.name: People before traffic
alignment_heuristics.question: Does the move understand people and scenes, or just acquire/monetize clicks?
alignment_heuristics.strong_signal: Product design reveals new scenes, relations, or emotional needs.
alignment_heuristics.red_flag: Success depends mainly on paid traffic resale or ad monetization.

alignment_heuristics.name: Demand certainty
alignment_heuristics.question: Does the move turn scattered demand into supply-useful certainty?
alignment_heuristics.strong_signal: Shared timing, grouping, deposits, social trust, or interest clusters reduce supply uncertainty.
alignment_heuristics.red_flag: The feature is only a coupon/referral tactic.

alignment_heuristics.name: Structural value-for-money
alignment_heuristics.question: Is low price caused by structural efficiency and quality improvement?
alignment_heuristics.strong_signal: Middle layers, waste, decision cost, or mismatch are reduced.
alignment_heuristics.red_flag: Price is subsidized, quality is sacrificed, or suppliers are squeezed.

alignment_heuristics.name: Good-currency loop
alignment_heuristics.question: Do rules make good actors win and bad actors lose?
alignment_heuristics.strong_signal: Anti-counterfeit, refund, merchant quality, and anti-corruption mechanisms improve with scale.
alignment_heuristics.red_flag: Fake goods, fake orders, low quality, or internal rent-seeking are tolerated as growth costs.

alignment_heuristics.name: Offset competition
alignment_heuristics.question: Is the company opening a new dimension instead of fighting old wars?
alignment_heuristics.strong_signal: A new use scene coexists with incumbents and expands the category.
alignment_heuristics.red_flag: The strategy is framed as territory capture, exclusivity, or becoming a smaller incumbent.

alignment_heuristics.name: Public institution
alignment_heuristics.question: Does governance mature beyond founder charisma?
alignment_heuristics.strong_signal: Succession, transparency, partner mechanisms, and social responsibility compound.
alignment_heuristics.red_flag: The founder remains the only immune system or the company is used for personal image.
